question:

List-I
(Pallavan Ruler)
A. Sivasakandavarman
B. Vishnugopa
C. Narasimhavarman-I
D. Nandivarman-II
List-II
(Political event)
I. Samudragupta's invasion
II. Kanchi came under the Pallavas
III. Defeated by Vikramaditya-II and city of Kanchi was captured
IV. Defeat of Pulakesin-II and destruction of Vatapi city
Choose the correct answer using the codes given below :
Which of the following is wrongly matched with respect to Rashtrakutas ?

options.1: Amoghavarsha : the first Kannada book writer
options.2: Dantidurga : the founder of Rashtrakuta kingdom
options.4: Krishna-III : the famous rock-cut temple of Shiva at Ellora

question: Identify the incorrect statement regarding the Cholas :

options.1: The Chola Empire was founded by Parantaka-I
